gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/399)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/399)
text: مَا جَعَلَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بَسْطَ اللِّسَانِ وَ كَفَّ الْيَدِ وَ لَكِنْ جَعَلَهُمَا يُبْسَطَانِ مَعاً وَ يُكَفَّانِ مَعاً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Yahya Al Taweel,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic has not Made the tongue to extend and the hand to restrain, but He<sup>azwj</sup> Made both of them to extend together, and restrain together (naturally)’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Yahya af-Tawif who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Allah, the most Majestic, the most Glorious, has not made the tongue to extend and the hands to withhold but that He has made them to extend and withhold together.”
